prompt:
Subject:
Halfway up a skyscraper's glass exterior

Person/Expression:
Adult woman aged 25-35. Mature, natural physique, calm face that doesn't look young. Japanese-style natural makeup, realistic skin. Loose low ponytail in dark brown, with thin bangs and flyaways. Expression is not too tense, with a soft, relaxed gaze.

Clothing/Pose:
Ivory short-length top, slightly deep and elegant V-neck, small ribbons on the shoulders, black short bottoms, black sneakers. Bare legs. Fashionable futuristic black gloves on both hands. The right hand touches the glass surface at a high position, and the left hand touches at a lower position. One leg is bent close to the wall, while the other is naturally extended downwards, with both legs clearly visible. A dynamic pose climbing the exterior wall of a skyscraper, similar to the reference image.

Background/Lighting:
A daytime view looking down at the skyscrapers of Tokyo. Roads, intersections, and green spaces spread out in the distance. The person's reflection appears naturally in the glass on the right. Natural light from the upper left softly illuminates the face and upper body, with glass reflections highlighting the silhouette.

Composition/Camera:
9:16 vertical aspect ratio. Perspective looking slightly down from a high point. The person is large in the center to right of the screen, emphasizing the vertical lines of the glass wall and the depth of the city. Sharp focus on the face and upper body, with the background left slightly soft to maintain atmosphere.

Texture/Style:
Japanese-style realistic photo, clean and high-definition, natural light, glass reflections, hair slightly tousled by the wind, balancing urban coolness with human softness.

Negative:
Minor, infantilization, excessive exposure, robotic arms, non-glove equipment, deformed fingers, unnaturally bent legs, collapsed posture, distorted face, inconsistent reflections, logos, text, watermarks, excessive HDR, plastic skin.
